name: Tryton REST API
description: RESTful API for Tryton ERP providing access to all business modules including financial accounting, stock/inventory, sales, purchasing, and production. Supports standard HTTP methods with JSON payloads, user application authentication, pagination via Range headers, domain filtering via query parameters, and context-based localization.

potentialAction.name: List Records
potentialAction.description: Retrieve a list of records from any Tryton model with optional domain filtering and pagination

potentialAction.name: Get Record
potentialAction.description: Retrieve a single record by ID from any Tryton model

potentialAction.name: Create Record
potentialAction.description: Create a new record in any Tryton model via POST with JSON payload

potentialAction.name: Update Record
potentialAction.description: Update an existing record in any Tryton model via PUT with JSON payload

potentialAction.name: Delete Record
potentialAction.description: Delete an existing record from any Tryton model via DELETE
